title: trigonotis rotundifolia
intro: Trigonotis rotundifolia, also known as the round-leaved trigonotis, is a type of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various digestive issues, such as indigestion and diarrhea. The health benefits of Trigonotis rotundifolia include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. Trigonotis rotundifolia is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and it can also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
